query: ALTER TABLE feedback ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LS6oXFmEKtYAwQA.root --database cRTBYDQNffnDPa87zbUz9b --execute ALTER TABLE feedback ADD COLUMN updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
